2604.24320.title: DPEPO: Diverse Parallel Exploration Policy Optimization for LLM-based Agents
2604.24320.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM) agents that follow the sequential "reason-then-act" paradigm have achieved superior performance in many complex tasks.However, these methods suffer from limited exploration and incomplete environmental understanding, as they interact with only a single environment per step. In this paper, we first introduce a novel paradigm that enables an agent to interact with multiple environments simultaneously and share cross-trajectory experiences. Building upon this paradigm, we further propose DPEPO, a reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that encourages the agent to perform diverse parallel exploration. There are two stages in DPEPO: initial supervised fine-tuning (SFT) imparts basic parallel reasoning and action generation, followed by reinforcement learning stage with a hierarchical reward scheme. We design a parallel trajectory-level success reward and two step-level rewards: Diverse Action Reward and Diverse State Transition Reward, which actively penalize behavioral redundancy and promote broad exploration. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld show that DPEPO achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) success rates, while maintaining comparable efficiency to strong sequential baselines. (Code is available at https://github.com/LePanda026/Code-for-DPEPO)
2604.24320.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理遵循順序的「推理然後行動」範式，在許多複雜任務中取得了卓越的表現。<lb/>然而，這些方法受到有限探索和不完整環境理解的限制，因為它們每一步僅與單一環境互動。<lb/>在本文中，我們首先介紹一種新穎的範式，使代理能夠同時與多個環境互動並共享跨軌跡經驗。<lb/>基於此範式，我們進一步提出了DPEPO，一種強化學習（RL）算法，鼓勵代理進行多樣化的平行探索。<lb/>DPEPO有兩個階段：初始的監督微調（SFT）賦予基本的平行推理和行動生成，隨後是具有分層獎勵方案的強化學習階段。<lb/>我們設計了一個平行軌跡級成功獎勵和兩個步驟級獎勵：多樣行動獎勵和多樣狀態轉換獎勵，這些獎勵主動懲罰行為冗餘並促進廣泛探索。<lb/>在ALFWorld和ScienceWorld上的廣泛實驗表明，DPEPO達到了最先進（SOTA）的成功率，同時保持與強大的順序基線相當的效率。<lb/>(代碼可在 https://github.com/LePanda026/Code-for-DPEPO 獲得)
2604.24320.author: Junshuo Zhang et.al.
2604.24320.authors: Junshuo Zhang, Chengrui Huang, Feng Guo, Zihan Li, Ke Shi, Menghua Jiang, Jiguo Yu, Shuo Shang, Shen Gao
